name: Bitrue Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access spot trading, futures, ETF products, market data, and account management, with a notable focus on XRP (Ripple) and XRP Ledger ecosystem tokens alongside standard crypto trading pairs.
use_cases: Accessing spot market data via Bitrue API for cryptocurrency price feeds and order books
Executing trades via Bitrue API for algorithmic trading with XRP pair focus
Managing futures positions via Bitrue API for cryptocurrency derivatives strategies
Streaming real-time data via Bitrue WebSocket for live order book and trade data
Fetching account balances via Bitrue API for portfolio tracking and rebalancing
not_for: US-based traders (Bitrue has restrictions for US users)
Non-XRP focused trading where deeper liquidity is needed (use Binance/Coinbase)
best_when: A developer or trader focuses on XRP ecosystem tokens, XRP Ledger assets, or needs access to an exchange with strong XRP pair coverage.
avoid_when: You need US compliance, top-tier liquidity across all assets, or institutional-grade infrastructure.

auth.notes: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Headers: X-MBX-APIKEY (API key in header). Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of query string + request body using secret key. Timestamp parameter required (recvWindow: default 5000ms tolerance). Binance-compatible API design — same pattern as Binance REST API. REST API at openapi.bitrue.com/api/v1/. WebSocket: wss://ws.bitrue.com/. Futures API: separate endpoint.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot trading fees: 0.098% standard
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume; BTR token for fee discounts
pricing.notes: Singaporean company. Founded 2018. XRP-focused exchange — one of the largest XRP trading volumes globally. BTR token: native exchange token for fee discounts. Products: Spot, Futures, ETF (leveraged tokens), Power Piggy (staking/savings). XRP ecosystem: large selection of XRPL-based tokens. Binance API compatibility: same authentication pattern as Binance (easier migration). Partnerships: Ripple ecosystem. Known for XRP giveaway promotions. ~250+ trading pairs. Global exchange with US restrictions.

performance.rate_limits: Weight-based: 1200 weight/minute; order limits: 100 orders/10 sec

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Binance-compatible API (same HMAC pattern). X-MBX-APIKEY header. Timestamp + recvWindow. XRP focus. Singaporean company. US-restricted. BTR token. Futures separate endpoint.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: use newClientOrderId for idempotent order tracking. Market data reads idempotent. Same pattern as Binance API.
known_agent_gotchas: Binance-compatible API: same HMAC-SHA256 pattern with X-MBX-APIKEY header — migrate Binance code with minimal changes
Timestamp recvWindow: default 5000ms tolerance — adjust for high-latency environments
Weight-based rate limiting (like Binance): each endpoint has a weight; 1200 total weight/minute
Futures API is a SEPARATE endpoint from spot — different base URL and potentially different auth
XRP-focused: best liquidity for XRP pairs; other pairs may have thinner order books
US-restricted exchange — verify access from your region before production integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 Binance-compatible pattern. Singaporean company: MAS regulatory environment. recvWindow prevents replay attacks (5-second default). X-MBX-APIKEY in header (not query param — better security). No OAuth2. API key IP whitelist recommended for trading bots. Secret key requires secure storage.
